title: Menopause symptoms
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.
presenting_history.rationale: Directly supports mapped vasomotor, cycle, mood, musculoskeletal, genitourinary, sexual, and quality-of-life symptom documentation.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

investigations.text: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped perimenopause and menopause terms and limits generic laboratory review in the defined age and contraception contexts.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.

treatment_and_management.text: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Directly supports clinician-documented counselling, benefit-risk, preference, HRT discussion, and repeated review.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.

treatment_and_management.text: Covers clinician-discussed moisturiser, lubricant, and vaginal-treatment options and ongoing review for genitourinary symptoms.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Directly supports mapped vaginal dryness and clinician-discussed moisturiser or lubricant documentation.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Covers clinician-discussed moisturiser, lubricant, and vaginal-treatment options and ongoing review for genitourinary symptoms.

treatment_and_management.text: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Directly supports mapped three-month and annual clinician-arranged review intervals.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.

additions.text: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.
additions.rationale: Directly supports mapped vasomotor, cycle, mood, musculoskeletal, genitourinary, sexual, and quality-of-life symptom documentation.
additions.evidence_extract: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

additions.text: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.
additions.rationale: Directly supports mapped perimenopause and menopause terms and limits generic laboratory review in the defined age and contraception contexts.
additions.evidence_extract: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.

additions.text: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.
additions.rationale: Directly supports clinician-documented counselling, benefit-risk, preference, HRT discussion, and repeated review.
additions.evidence_extract: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.

source_limitations: Abnormal bleeding, suicidal ideation, examination findings, UAE prescribing, specific HRT choice, treatment initiation, and non-hormonal medication options remain unsupported by this mapping.
The perimenopause label remains clinician-stated and age-dependent.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
